memberdef.argsstring: (const int part_i, const int part_j, const bool is_part_part_collision)

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.

detaileddescription.para: Description: This class enables to compute solid-solid interactions for fpi module under the framework of soft-sphere collision model. Under this framework, multiple collisions can occurs at the same time (ie a particle can collide with 2 or more particles). The collision is spread out on multiple time steps. A slight overlap (less than the mesh grid size) occurs during the process.
